text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh hey. The name's Nice Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I wanna be the best racer there ever was! Just
kidding, I'm not like that. Well, I guess I'll try as
long as there's still someone cheering for me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Though to tell you the truth, I would like to win. ...Yeah, all right, it's settled. I'll give it my best shot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
